Author: FKL dev
Name: AetherTV
Description:
Projects YouTube videos and livestreams (and any source) onto a surface in the world or onto a minion, with a synchronized broadcast from the host to the peers. Requires DirectX 11.

⚠ IN TESTING & VALIDATION: the plugin is still in development and may freeze/crash.

To show the video ON A MINION you must install the (Penumbra) mod that provides the correct minion screen shape: https://www.xivmodarchive.com/modid/112306
Punchline: Watch YouTube videos and livestreams (and more) on a wall in FFXIV, together with your friends.
